name: Ledyba
description:
These very cowardly Pokémon join together and
use Reflect to protect their nest.

name: Ledian
description:
It flies through the night sky, sprinkling sparkly
dust. According to some, if that dust sticks to
you, good things will happen to you.

attacks.name: Swift
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Shuckle
description:
The berries stored in its vaselike shell eventually
become a thick, pulpy juice.

attacks.name: Guard Press
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes −20 damage from attacks.

name: Roselia
description:
It uses the different poisons in each hand
separately when it attacks. The stronger its
aroma, the healthier it is.

attacks.name: Trip Over
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

name: Roserade
description:
The poison in its right hand is quick acting.
The poison in its left hand is slow acting.
Both are life threatening.

attacks.name: Poison Ring
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned. During your opponent's next turn, that Pokémon can't retreat.

name: Cacnea
description:
It lives in arid locations. Its yellow flowers bloom
once a year.

name: Cacturne
description:
It lives in deserts. It becomes active at night
when it hunts for prey exhausted from the
desert's heat.

attacks.name: Spike Rend
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon has damage on it, this attack does 60 more damage.

name: Chespin
description:
Eating lots of berries makes the bark shell that
covers Chespin's head and body grow sturdier.

name: Quilladin
description:
It can send a trailer flying with a tackle. It's numb
to pain, so even violent collisions don't faze it.

name: Chesnaught
description:
Its gentle disposition would have it avoid
conflict, but it gives opponents a thrashing with
its thorned fists when the situation calls for it.

attacks.name: Needle Lariat
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, if this Pokémon is damaged by an attack, do 80 damage to the Attacking Pokémon.

name: Scatterbug
description:
This Pokémon scatters poisonous powder
to repel enemies. It will eat different plants
depending on where it lives.

name: Spewpa
description:
Spewpa doesn't live in a fixed location. It roams
where it pleases across the fields and mountains,
building up the energy it needs to evolve.

attacks.name: Signs of Evolution
attacks.effect: Put a random card that evolves from Spewpa from your deck into your hand.

name: Vivillon
description:
This Pokémon was born in a land where flowers
bloom. It scatters colorful, toxic scales from its
wings during battle.

attacks.name: Vivid Powder
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned and Asleep.

name: Buzzwole
description:
Buzzwole goes around showing off its
abnormally swollen muscles. It is one kind
of Ultra Beast.

attacks.name: Ground Beat
attacks.effect: If your opponent has gotten exactly 1 points, this attack does 40 more damage.

name: Gossifleur
description:
It whirls around in the wind while singing a joyous
song. This delightful display has charmed many
into raising this Pokémon.

name: Eldegoss
description:
The cotton on the head of this Pokémon can be
spun into a glossy, gorgeous yarn—a Galar
regional specialty.

attacks.name: Float Up
attacks.effect: You may shuffle this Pokémon and all attached cards into your deck.

abilities.name: Soothing Wind
abilities.effect: Each of your Pokémon that has any Energy attached recovers from all Special Conditions and can't be affected by any Special Conditions.

attacks.name: Energized Leaves
attacks.effect: If the amount of Energy attached to both Active Pokémon is 5 or more, this attack does 60 more damage.

name: Alolan Marowak
description:
The cursed flames that light up the bone carried
by this Pokémon are said to cause both mental
and physical pain that will never fade.

attacks.name: Fiery Bone
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

name: Reshiram
description:
When Reshiram's tail flares, the heat energy moves
the atmosphere and changes the world's weather.

attacks.name: Blue Flare
attacks.effect: Discard 2 {R} Energy from this Pokémon.

name: Litleo
description:
The more a Litleo trains its body and spirit by
battling mighty enemies, the hotter its mane
will grow.

name: Pyroar
description:
The females of a pride work together to bring
down prey. It's thanks to them that their pride
doesn't starve.

name: Oricorio
description:
This form of Oricorio has sipped red nectar. It whips up
blazing flames as it moves to the steps of its passionate dance.

attacks.name: Inspiring Dance
attacks.effect: During your next turn, attacks used by your Pokémon do +20 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Singe
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Pop-Punk
attacks.effect: Discard 3 {R} Energy from this Pokémon.

name: Scorbunny
description:
Fire energy gathers in the pads of its feet,
raising their temperature. Once hot, Scorbunny's
footpads can deal heavy damage to opponents.

name: Raboot
description:
While it prides itself on its varied kicking moves,
it can also deliver powerful headbutts once its
flames have heated up its forehead.

name: Cinderace
description:
Using a ball that it made out of flames,
Cinderace blinds its opponents and
keeps them at bay.

attacks.name: Fireball Shot
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

name: Hearthflame Mask Ogerpon
description:
In this form, it draws on the power of fire.
It spears its enemies with thorn-covered ivy.

attacks.name: Hearthflame Dance
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, take 2 {R} Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

name: Alolan Vulpix
description:
In hot weather, this Pokémon makes ice shards
with its six tails and sprays them around to cool
itself off.

attacks.name: Binding Snow
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, they can't take any Energy from their Energy Zone to attach to their Active Pokémon.

name: Galarian Mr. Mime
description:
It can radiate chilliness from the bottoms of its
feet. It'll spend the whole day tap-dancing on a
frozen floor.

name: Galarian Mr. Rime
description:
Its amusing movements make it very popular.
It releases its psychic power from the pattern
on its belly.

attacks.name: Triple Spin
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 60 damage for each heads.

name: Delibird
description:
It always carries its food with it, wherever it goes.
If attacked, it throws its food at the opponent.

attacks.name: Box of Surprises
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 70 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon. If tails, heal 30 damage from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Mudkip
description:
When it uses its large tail fin, it picks up speed
rapidly in the water. It is strong in spite of its
small size.

name: Marshtomp
description:
It is at its best when on muddy ground that offers
poor footing. It quickly overwhelms opponents
that are bogged down and unable to move.

name: Swampert
description:
Swampert's arms are rock-hard. With one swing,
they can batter down Swampert's foes. This
Pokémon makes its nest on beautiful beaches.

attacks.name: Large Whirlpool
attacks.effect: Discard a random Energy from among the Energy attached to all Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's).

name: Mega Swampert ex
description:
Its arms are hard as rock. With one swing, it can
break an enormous boulder into pieces.

attacks.name: Strong-Armed Destroyer
attacks.effect: Discard 2 random Energy from among the Energy attached to all Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's).

name: Vanillite
description:
Supposedly, this Pokémon was born from an
icicle. It spews out freezing air at −58 degrees
Fahrenheit to make itself more comfortable.

name: Vanillish
description:
It blasts enemies with cold air reaching −148
degrees Fahrenheit, freezing them solid. But it
spares their lives afterward—it's a kind Pokémon.

name: Vanilluxe
description:
People believe this Pokémon formed when two
Vanillish stuck together. Its body temperature is
roughly 21 degrees Fahrenheit.

attacks.name: Sweets Relay
attacks.effect: If 1 of your Pokémon used Sweets Relay during your last turn, this attack does 60 more damage.

name: Cryogonal
description:
Cryogonal uses its chains of ice to constrict its
opponents and then flash-freezes them where
they stand.

attacks.name: Frozen Lock
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, they can't play any Item cards from their hand.

name: Amaura
description:
Amaura is an ancient Pokémon that has gone
extinct. Specimens of this species can sometimes
be found frozen in ice.

name: Aurorus
description:
When gripped by rage, Aurorus will emanate
freezing air, covering everything around it in ice.

attacks.name: Hail Prison
attacks.effect: Discard Water2 {W} Energy from this Pokémon. Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Chewtle
description:
A popular game among children is to lift up sticks
that Chewtle have bitten onto to see whose
Chewtle can hang on the longest.

name: Drednaw
description:
Drednaw lurks along the shoreline. When prey
come to drink water, Drednaw stretches its neck
out and chomps down on them.

name: Cramorant
description:
Cramorant takes advantage of Arrokuda's frantic
thrashing to help spit Arrokuda out at high speed.

attacks.name: Spit-Out Shot
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

name: Arrokuda
description:
After it's eaten its fill, its movements become
extremely sluggish. That's when Cramorant
swallows it up.

name: Barraskewda
description:
It spins its tail fins to propel itself, surging
forward at speeds of over 100 knots before
ramming prey and spearing into them.

name: Wellspring Mask Ogerpon
description:
In this form, it draws on the power of water.
It attacks unrelentingly with kicks and ivy strikes.

attacks.name: Wellspring Dance
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack also does 40 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

name: Pikachu
description:
When several of these Pokémon gather, their
electricity can build and cause lightning storms.

attacks.name: Thunder Jolt
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

name: Alolan Raichu
description:
This Pokémon rides on its tail while it uses
its psychic powers to levitate. It attacks with
star-shaped thunderbolts.

abilities.name: Surge Surfer
abilities.effect: If a Stadium is in play, this Pokémon has no Retreat Cost.

attacks.name: Thunder Spear
attacks.effect: This attack does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

name: Zapdos
description:
Zapdos is a legendary bird Pokémon. It's said
that when Zapdos rubs its feathers together,
lightning will fall immediately after.

attacks.name: Heavy Thunder
attacks.effect: 1 other Pokémon (either yours or your opponent's) is chosen at random 1 time. Do 100 damage to the chosen Pokémon.

name: Plusle
description:
This Pokémon absorbs electricity from telephone
poles. It shorts out the electricity stored inside its
body to create noises.

attacks.name: Electric Tail
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Minun
description:
Its dislike of water makes it take shelter under
the eaves of houses in rain. It uses pom-poms
made of sparks for cheering.

attacks.name: Buddy Spark
attacks.effect: If Plusle is on your Bench, this attack also does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

name: Toxel
description:
This selfish, attention-seeking Pokémon stores
poison and electricity in two different sacs inside
its body.

attacks.name: Damaging Spark
attacks.effect: This attack also does 30 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon that has damage on it.

name: Tadbulb
description:
It floats using the electricity stored in its body.
When thunderclouds are around, Tadbulb will
float higher off the ground.

attacks.name: Charge
attacks.effect: Take a {L} Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to this Pokémon.

name: Bellibolt
description:
What appear to be eyeballs are actually organs
for discharging the electricity generated by
Bellibolt's belly-button dynamo.

name: Galarian Ponyta
description:
This Pokémon will look into your eyes and read
the contents of your heart. If it finds evil there,
it promptly hides away.

name: Galarian Rapidash
description:
Brave and prideful, this Pokémon dashes airily
through the forest, its steps aided by the psychic
power stored in the fur on its fetlocks.

attacks.name: Photon Laser
attacks.effect: If you have 5 or more {P} Energy in play, this attack does 60 more damage.

name: Wobbuffet
description:
To keep its pitch-black tail hidden, it lives quietly
in the darkness. It is never first to attack.

attacks.name: Flip Over
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

name: Snubbull
description:
Its growls make its opponents uneasy. This
laid-back Pokémon tends to sleep half the day.

name: Granbull
description:
It can make most any Pokémon run away
by opening its big mouth to reveal its
thick fangs.

name: Ralts
description:
It is highly attuned to the emotions of people
and Pokémon. It hides if it senses hostility.

attacks.name: Confuse Ray
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

name: Kirlia
description:
The cheerful spirit of its Trainer gives it energy
for its psychokinetic power. It spins and dances
when happy.

attacks.name: Psybeam
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

name: Gardevoir
description:
It unleashes psychokinetic energy at full power
when protecting a Trainer it has bonded closely
with.

attacks.name: Psy Turbo
attacks.effect: Take 2 {P} Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your Benched {P} Pokémon.

name: Mega Gardevoir ex
description:
When it opens the red plate on its chest and
unleashes its heart, its strongest psychic power
is released.

attacks.name: Fantasia Force
attacks.effect: Take 3 {P} Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to your {P} Pokémon in any way you like.

name: Litwick
description:
While shining a light and pretending to be a
guide, it leeches off the life-force of any who
follow it.

name: Lampent
description:
The spirits it absorbs fuel its baleful fire. It hangs
around hospitals waiting for people to pass on.

name: Chandelure
description:
It absorbs spirits, which it then burns. By waving
the flames on its arms, it puts its foes into a
hypnotic trance.

attacks.name: Past Friends
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each Supporter card in your discard pile.

name: Meloetta
description:
Its melodies are sung with a special vocalization
method that can control the feelings of those who
hear it.

abilities.name: Strange Singing
abilities.effect: At the beginning of your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, put a random {P} Pokémon from your deck into your hand.

name: Pumpkaboo
description:
The light that streams out from the holes in the
pumpkin can hypnotize and control the people
and Pokémon that see it.

name: Gourgeist
description:
In the darkness of a new-moon night, Gourgeist
will come knocking. Whoever answers the door
will be swept off to the afterlife.

attacks.name: Soul Shot
attacks.effect: Discard a card from your hand. If you can't, this attack does nothing.

abilities.name: Disguise
abilities.effect: When this Pokémon is first damaged by an attack after coming into play, prevent that damage.

name: Sinistea
description:
Sinistea gets into your body when you drink it,
and then it steals your vitality from within. It also
tastes awful.

attacks.name: Hide
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from—and effects of—attacks done to this Pokémon.

name: Polteageist
description:
These Pokémon multiply by creeping into teapots
and pouring themselves into leftover tea.

abilities.name: Refreshing Tea
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, when you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon, you may have your opponent shuffle their hand into their deck. For each remaining point that your opponent needs to win, they draw a card.

name: Indeedee
description:
This Pokémon never leaves its Trainer's side.
It predicts their actions with its psychic power
and takes care of their day-to-day needs.

attacks.name: Zen Shard
attacks.effect: This attack does 70 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

name: Sandshrew
description:
No matter how high a place it falls from, this
Pokémon can save itself by rolling into a ball
and bouncing.

attacks.name: Double Scratch
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

name: Sandslash
description:
The spikes on its body are made up of its
hardened hide. It rolls up and attacks foes
with its spikes.

attacks.name: Fury Swipes
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 30 damage for each heads.

name: Machop
description:
Always brimming with power, it passes time by
lifting boulders. Doing so makes it even stronger.

attacks.name: Shatter
attacks.effect: Discard a Stadium in play.

name: Machoke
description:
Its formidable body never gets tired. It helps
people by doing work such as the moving of
heavy goods.

name: Machamp
description:
With four arms that react more quickly than it
can think, it can execute many punches at once.

attacks.name: Knocking Hammer
attacks.effect: Discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

name: Cubone
description:
This Pokémon wears the skull of its deceased
mother. Sometimes Cubone's dreams make it cry,
but each tear Cubone sheds makes it stronger.

name: Meditite
description:
It meditates to heighten its inner energy and to
float in the air. It eats one berry a day.

name: Medicham
description:
It elegantly avoids attacks with dance-like
steps, then launches a devastating blow in
the same motion.

attacks.name: Psykick
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has any {P} Energy attached, this attack does 50 more damage.

name: Roggenrola
description:
When it detects a noise, it starts to move.
The energy core inside it makes this Pokémon
slightly warm to the touch.

name: Boldore
description:
It relies on sound in order to monitor what's in its
vicinity. When angered, it will attack without ever
changing the direction it's facing.

attacks.name: Megaton Cannon
attacks.effect: This attack does 140 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

name: Drilbur
description:
It makes its way swiftly through the soil by putting
both claws together and rotating at high speed.

name: Tyrunt
description:
This Pokémon is selfish and likes to be pampered.
It can also inflict grievous wounds on its Trainer
just by playing around.

name: Tyrantrum
description:
A single bite of Tyrantrum's massive jaws will
demolish a car. This Pokémon was the king of the
ancient world.

attacks.name: Tyrannical Fang
attacks.effect: If you have fewer Pokémon in play than your opponent, this attack does 80 more damage.

name: Passimian
description:
The boss chooses 10 members of the group to
go out hunting. The hunting party will evenly split
the food they find with the rest of the group.

attacks.name: Fling
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

name: Falinks
description:
The leader, known as the brass, uses its
extendible horn to issue orders to the others
when it's time to change formation.

abilities.name: Coordinated Unit
abilities.effect: If you have another Falinks in play, this Pokémon's attacks do +20 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon, and this Pokémon takes −20 damage from attacks from your opponent's Pokémon.

name: Cornerstone Mask Ogerpon
description:
In this form, it draws on the power of stone.
Its body is rock-solid, protecting it from all
manner of attacks.

attacks.name: Cornerstone Dance
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes −100 damage from attacks.

name: Alolan Meowth
description:
Deeply proud and keenly smart, this Pokémon
moves with cunning during battle and relentlessly
attacks enemies' weak points.

attacks.name: Swagger
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard a random Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Alolan Persian
description:
This Pokémon is one tough opponent. Not only
does it have formidable physical abilities, but it's
also not above fighting dirty.

name: Alolan Grimer
description:
Alolan Grimer will gladly gobble up any kind
of trash, making it a widely used and popular
Pokémon at garbage disposal facilities.

name: Alolan Muk
description:
What look like fangs and claws are actually
crystallized poison that will afflict you at a
mere touch, so don't get too close.

abilities.name: Power of Alchemy
abilities.effect: Basic Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) have no Abilities.

name: Galarian Zigzagoon
description:
Thought to be the oldest form of Zigzagoon,
it moves in zigzags and wreaks havoc upon
its surroundings.

name: Galarian Linoone
description:
This very aggressive Pokémon will recklessly
challenge opponents stronger than itself.

name: Galarian Obstagoon
description:
It evolved after experiencing numerous fights.
While crossing its arms, it lets out a shout that
would make any opponent flinch.

attacks.name: Merciless Strike
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon has damage on it, this attack does 50 more damage.

name: Stunky
description:
The foul fluid from its rear is so revolting that it
can make people feel queasy up to a mile and a
quarter away.

name: Skuntank
description:
It attacks by spraying a repugnant fluid from its
tail, but the stench dulls after a few squirts.

attacks.name: Smokescreen Shot
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, if the Defending Pokémon tries to use an attack, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack doesn't happen.

name: Spiritomb
description:
It was formed by uniting 108 spirits. It has been
bound to the Odd Keystone to keep it from
doing any mischief.

abilities.name: Final Scream
abilities.effect: If this Pokémon is in the Active Spot and is Knocked Out by damage from an attack from your opponent's Pokémon, do 10 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon.

name: Purrloin
description:
Opponents that get drawn in by its adorable
behavior come away with stinging scratches from
its claws and stinging pride from its laughter.

attacks.name: Whiny Voice
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, look at a random card from your opponent's hand and shuffle it into their deck.

name: Liepard
description:
Don't be fooled by its gorgeous fur and elegant
figure. This is a moody and vicious Pokémon.

attacks.name: Fasten Claws
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

name: Scraggy
description:
It will abruptly headbutt anyone that makes eye
contact with it. Its skull is extremely hard.

name: Scrafty
description:
This Pokémon may be rude, but it takes very
good care of its family, its friends, and its turf.

attacks.name: Crush the Weak
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has more Energy attached than your opponent's Active Pokémon, this attack does 50 more damage.

name: Yveltal
description:
When its life comes to an end, it absorbs
the life energy of every living thing
and turns into a cocoon once more.

attacks.name: Evil Crash
attacks.effect: Discard a random Energy from both Active Pokémon.

name: Guzzlord
description:
An unknown life-form called a UB. It may be
constantly hungry—it is certainly always
devouring something.

attacks.name: Breakcore
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard your opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Galarian Meowth
description:
These daring Pokémon have coins on their
foreheads. Darker coins are harder, and harder
coins garner more respect among Meowth.

name: Galarian Perrserker
description:
After many battles, it evolved dangerous
claws that come together to form daggers
when extended.

abilities.name: Dig Up
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, when you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon, you may put 2 random Pokémon Tool cards from your discard pile into your hand.

name: Mawile
description:
It chomps with its gaping mouth. Its huge jaws are
actually steel horns that have been transformed.

name: Mega Mawile ex
description:
Its two sets of jaws thrash about violently as if
they each had a will of their own. One gnash from
them can turn a boulder to dust.

attacks.name: Heat-Up Crunch
attacks.effect: Until this Pokémon leaves the Active Spot, this Pokémon's Heat-Up Crunch attack does +30 damage. This effect stacks.

name: Excadrill
description:
Its drill, which has evolved into steel, is strong
enough to bore through iron plates. This
Pokémon is a great help in tunnel construction.

name: Ferroseed
description:
Mossy caves are their preferred dwellings.
Enzymes contained in mosses help Ferroseed's
spikes grow big and strong.

name: Ferrothorn
description:
Its spikes are harder than steel. This Pokémon
crawls across rock walls by stabbing the spikes
on its feelers into the stone.

attacks.name: Pummel
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 60 more damage.

name: Galarian Stunfisk
description:
Its conspicuous lips lure prey in as it lies in wait in
the mud. When prey gets close, Stunfisk clamps
its jagged steel fins down on them.

attacks.name: Snapping Trap
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot when your opponent's Active Pokémon retreats, this attack does 40 damage to the new Active Pokémon.

name: Honedge
description:
The blue eye on the sword's handguard is the
true body of Honedge. With its old cloth, it
drains people's lives away.

name: Doublade
description:
The two swords employ a strategy of rapidly
alternating between offense and defense to
bring down their prey.

attacks.name: Dual Blades
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 40 damage for each heads.

name: Aegislash
description:
Its potent spectral powers allow it to manipulate
others. It once used its powers to force people
and Pokémon to build a kingdom to its liking.

attacks.name: Superb Shield
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes −80 damage from attacks from your opponent's Pokémon ex.

name: Bagon
description:
Its belief that it will be able to fly one day is
apparently the influence of information carried
in its genes.

name: Shelgon
description:
Its armored body makes all attacks bounce off.
The armor is too tough, however, making it heavy
and somewhat sluggish.

name: Salamence
description:
It becomes uncontrollable if it is enraged.
It destroys everything with shredding claws
and fire.

attacks.name: Dragon Dive
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this Pokémon also does 50 damage to itself.

name: Meowth
description:
It loves things that sparkle. When it sees a shiny
object, the gold coin on its head shines, too.

abilities.name: Carefree Steps
abilities.effect: If any damage is done to this Pokémon by attacks, flip a coin. If heads, prevent that damage.

attacks.name: Feelin' Fine
attacks.effect: Draw a card.

name: Persian
description:
It has a vicious temperament. Beware if it raises
its tail straight up. This is a signal that it is about
to pounce and bite.

name: Kangaskhan
description:
There are records of a lost human child being
raised by a childless Kangaskhan.

attacks.name: Steady Punch
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

name: Mega Kangaskhan ex
description:
Mega Kangaskhan's strength derives from the
mother's happiness about her child's growth.
Watching it grow up keeps her spirits high.

attacks.name: Double-Punching Family
attacks.effect:
This attack is used twice in a row. The second attack does 40 damage.
(If the first attack Knocks Out your opponent's Active Pokémon, the second attack is used after your opponent chooses a new Active Pokémon.)

name: Sentret
description:
If it encounters a foe, it will stand up on its tail,
making itself look bigger than usual to intimidate
them.

attacks.name: Tail Rap
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

name: Furret
description:
It is nimble and has a very flexible body.
Even if you get ahold of it, it'll slip right out
of your arms.

name: Smeargle
description:
The color of the mysterious fluid secreted from
the tip of the tail is predetermined for each
Smeargle.

abilities.name: Portrait
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may look at a random Supporter card from your opponent's hand. Use the effect of that card as the effect of this Ability.

name: Lugia
description:
It is said to be the guardian of the seas. It is
rumored to have been seen on the night of a storm.

attacks.name: Aeroblast
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 40 more damage for each heads.

name: Taillow
description:
It dislikes cold seasons. They migrate to other
lands in search of warmth, flying over 180 miles
a day.

name: Swellow
description:
It dives at a steep angle as soon as it spots its
prey. It catches its prey with sharp claws.

abilities.name: Repelling Wind
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may switch out your opponent's Active Basic Pokémon to the Bench. (Your opponent chooses the new Active Pokémon.)

name: Slakoth
description:
The way Slakoth lolls around makes anyone who
watches it feel like doing the same.

attacks.name: Yawn
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

name: Vigoroth
description:
It is always hungry because it won't stop
rampaging. Even while it is eating, it can't
keep still.

attacks.name: Best Punch
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

name: Slaking
description:
This Pokémon lives lying on its side. It only
rolls over and moves when there is no more
grass to eat.

abilities.name: Snoozing Habit
abilities.effect: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, whenever you attach an Energy from your Energy Zone to it, it is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Knuckle Sandwich
attacks.effect: Discard a random Energy from this Pokémon.

name: Spinda
description:
Each Spinda's spot pattern is different. With its
stumbling movements, it evades opponents'
attacks brilliantly!

attacks.name: Teetering Steps
attacks.effect: This Pokémon is now Confused.

name: Tornadus
description:
Tornadus expels massive energy from its tail,
causing severe storms. Its power is great enough
to blow houses away.

attacks.name: Blow Through
attacks.effect: If a Stadium is in play, this attack does 40 more damage.

name: Bunnelby
description:
It's very sensitive to danger. The sound of
Corviknight's flapping will have Bunnelby
digging a hole to hide underground in moments.

name: Diggersby
description:
The fur on its belly retains heat exceptionally
well. People used to make heavy winter clothing
from fur shed by this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Earthquake
attacks.effect: This attack also does 10 damage to each of your Benched Pokémon.

name: Furfrou
description:
Left alone, its fur will grow longer and longer,
but it will only allow someone it trusts to cut it.

abilities.name: Fur Coat
abilities.effect: This Pokémon takes −20 damage from attacks.

name: Tandemaus
description:
The pair sticks together no matter what. They
split any food they find exactly in half and then
eat it together.

attacks.name: Flock
attacks.effect: Put 3 random cards from among Tandemaus and Maushold from your deck onto your Bench.

name: Maushold
description:
The larger pair protects the little ones during
battles. When facing strong opponents, the
whole group will join the fight.

attacks.name: Family Beatdown
attacks.effect: Flip a coin for each Tandemaus and Maushold you have in play. This attack does 60 damage for each heads.

name: Jaw Fossil
effect:
Play this card as if it were a 40-HP Basic {C} Pokémon.
At any time during your turn, you may discard this card from play.
This card can't retreat.

name: Lucky Ice Pop
effect: Heal 20 damage from your Active Pokémon. If you healed any damage in this way, flip a coin. If heads, put this Lucky Ice Pop into your hand instead of the discard pile.

name: Sail Fossil
effect:
Play this card as if it were a 40-HP Basic {C} Pokémon.
At any time during your turn, you may discard this card from play.
This card can't retreat.

name: Protective Poncho
effect: As long as the Pokémon this card is attached to is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to that Pokémon by your opponent's attacks and Abilities.

name: Metal Core Barrier
effect:
If this card is attached to 1 of your Pokémon, discard it at the end of your opponent's turn.

The {M} Pokémon this card is attached to takes −50 damage from attacks from your opponent's Pokémon.

name: Diantha
effect: Heal 90 damage from 1 of your {P} Pokémon that has 2 or more {P} Energy attached. If you healed any damage in this way, discard 2 {P} Energy from that Pokémon.

name: Sightseer
effect: Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. Put all Stage 1 Pokémon you find there into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

name: Juggler
effect:
You can use this card only if your Pokémon in play have 3 or more different types of Energy attached.

Move all Energy from each of your Benched Pokémon to your Active Pokémon.

name: Piers
effect:
You can use this card only if you have Galarian Obstagoon in play.

Discard 2 random Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Training Area
effect: Attacks used by Stage 1 Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) do +10 damage to the opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Starting Plains
effect: Each Basic Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) gets +20 HP.

name: Peculiar Plaza
effect: The Retreat Cost of each {P} Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) is 2 less.

name: Cacnea
description:
It lives in arid locations. Its yellow flowers bloom
once a year.

name: Roserade
description:
The poison in its right hand is quick acting.
The poison in its left hand is slow acting.
Both are life threatening.

attacks.name: Poison Ring
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned. During your opponent's next turn, that Pokémon can't retreat.

name: Vivillon
description:
This Pokémon was born in a land where flowers
bloom. It scatters colorful, toxic scales from its
wings during battle.

attacks.name: Vivid Powder
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned and Asleep.

name: Buzzwole
description:
Buzzwole goes around showing off its
abnormally swollen muscles. It is one kind
of Ultra Beast.

attacks.name: Ground Beat
attacks.effect: If your opponent has gotten exactly 1 points, this attack does 40 more damage.

name: Reshiram
description:
When Reshiram's tail flares, the heat energy moves
the atmosphere and changes the world's weather.

attacks.name: Blue Flare
attacks.effect: Discard 2 {R} Energy from this Pokémon.

name: Oricorio
description:
This form of Oricorio has sipped red nectar. It whips up
blazing flames as it moves to the steps of its passionate dance.

attacks.name: Inspiring Dance
attacks.effect: During your next turn, attacks used by your Pokémon do +20 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Scorbunny
description:
Fire energy gathers in the pads of its feet,
raising their temperature. Once hot, Scorbunny's
footpads can deal heavy damage to opponents.

name: Aurorus
description:
When gripped by rage, Aurorus will emanate
freezing air, covering everything around it in ice.

attacks.name: Hail Prison
attacks.effect: Discard Water2 {W} Energy from this Pokémon. Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Cramorant
description:
Cramorant takes advantage of Arrokuda's frantic
thrashing to help spit Arrokuda out at high speed.

attacks.name: Spit-Out Shot
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

name: Minun
description:
Its dislike of water makes it take shelter under
the eaves of houses in rain. It uses pom-poms
made of sparks for cheering.

attacks.name: Buddy Spark
attacks.effect: If Plusle is on your Bench, this attack also does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

name: Toxel
description:
This selfish, attention-seeking Pokémon stores
poison and electricity in two different sacs inside
its body.

name: Galarian Ponyta
description:
This Pokémon will look into your eyes and read
the contents of your heart. If it finds evil there,
it promptly hides away.

name: Snubbull
description:
Its growls make its opponents uneasy. This
laid-back Pokémon tends to sleep half the day.

name: Indeedee
description:
This Pokémon never leaves its Trainer's side.
It predicts their actions with its psychic power
and takes care of their day-to-day needs.

attacks.name: Zen Shard
attacks.effect: This attack does 70 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

name: Sandshrew
description:
No matter how high a place it falls from, this
Pokémon can save itself by rolling into a ball
and bouncing.

attacks.name: Double Scratch
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

name: Tyrantrum
description:
A single bite of Tyrantrum's massive jaws will
demolish a car. This Pokémon was the king of the
ancient world.

attacks.name: Tyrannical Fang
attacks.effect: If you have fewer Pokémon in play than your opponent, this attack does 80 more damage.

name: Falinks
description:
The leader, known as the brass, uses its
extendible horn to issue orders to the others
when it's time to change formation.

abilities.name: Coordinated Unit
abilities.effect: If you have another Falinks in play, this Pokémon's attacks do +20 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon, and this Pokémon takes −20 damage from attacks from your opponent's Pokémon.

name: Alolan Muk
description:
What look like fangs and claws are actually
crystallized poison that will afflict you at a
mere touch, so don't get too close.

abilities.name: Power of Alchemy
abilities.effect: Basic Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) have no Abilities.

name: Purrloin
description:
Opponents that get drawn in by its adorable
behavior come away with stinging scratches from
its claws and stinging pride from its laughter.

attacks.name: Whiny Voice
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, look at a random card from your opponent's hand and shuffle it into their deck.

name: Yveltal
description:
When its life comes to an end, it absorbs
the life energy of every living thing
and turns into a cocoon once more.

attacks.name: Evil Crash
attacks.effect: Discard a random Energy from both Active Pokémon.

name: Galarian Obstagoon
description:
It evolved after experiencing numerous fights.
While crossing its arms, it lets out a shout that
would make any opponent flinch.

attacks.name: Merciless Strike
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon has damage on it, this attack does 50 more damage.

name: Galarian Perrserker
description:
After many battles, it evolved dangerous
claws that come together to form daggers
when extended.

abilities.name: Dig Up
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, when you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon, you may put 2 random Pokémon Tool cards from your discard pile into your hand.

name: Salamence
description:
It becomes uncontrollable if it is enraged.
It destroys everything with shredding claws
and fire.

attacks.name: Dragon Dive
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this Pokémon also does 50 damage to itself.

name: Slakoth
description:
The way Slakoth lolls around makes anyone who
watches it feel like doing the same.

attacks.name: Yawn
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

abilities.name: Soothing Wind
abilities.effect: Each of your Pokémon that has any Energy attached recovers from all Special Conditions and can't be affected by any Special Conditions.

attacks.name: Energized Leaves
attacks.effect: If the amount of Energy attached to both Active Pokémon is 5 or more, this attack does 60 more damage.

attacks.name: Singe
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Pop-Punk
attacks.effect: Discard 3 {R} Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Binding Snow
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, they can't take any Energy from their Energy Zone to attach to their Active Pokémon.

name: Mega Swampert ex
description:
Its arms are hard as rock. With one swing, it can
break an enormous boulder into pieces.

attacks.name: Strong-Armed Destroyer
attacks.effect: Discard 2 random Energy from among the Energy attached to all Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's).

attacks.name: Damaging Spark
attacks.effect: This attack also does 30 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon that has damage on it.

name: Mega Gardevoir ex
description:
When it opens the red plate on its chest and
unleashes its heart, its strongest psychic power
is released.

attacks.name: Fantasia Force
attacks.effect: Take 3 {P} Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to your {P} Pokémon in any way you like.

abilities.name: Disguise
abilities.effect: When this Pokémon is first damaged by an attack after coming into play, prevent that damage.

attacks.name: Megaton Cannon
attacks.effect: This attack does 140 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

name: Mega Mawile ex
description:
Its two sets of jaws thrash about violently as if
they each had a will of their own. One gnash from
them can turn a boulder to dust.

attacks.name: Heat-Up Crunch
attacks.effect: Until this Pokémon leaves the Active Spot, this Pokémon's Heat-Up Crunch attack does +30 damage. This effect stacks.

name: Mega Kangaskhan ex
description:
Mega Kangaskhan's strength derives from the
mother's happiness about her child's growth.
Watching it grow up keeps her spirits high.

attacks.name: Double-Punching Family
attacks.effect:
This attack is used twice in a row. The second attack does 40 damage.
(If the first attack Knocks Out your opponent's Active Pokémon, the second attack is used after your opponent chooses a new Active Pokémon.)

name: Diantha
effect: Heal 90 damage from 1 of your {P} Pokémon that has 2 or more {P} Energy attached. If you healed any damage in this way, discard 2 {P} Energy from that Pokémon.

name: Sightseer
effect: Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. Put all Stage 1 Pokémon you find there into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

name: Juggler
effect:
You can use this card only if your Pokémon in play have 3 or more different types of Energy attached.

Move all Energy from each of your Benched Pokémon to your Active Pokémon.

name: Piers
effect:
You can use this card only if you have Galarian Obstagoon in play.

Discard 2 random Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

abilities.name: Soothing Wind
abilities.effect: Each of your Pokémon that has any Energy attached recovers from all Special Conditions and can't be affected by any Special Conditions.

attacks.name: Energized Leaves
attacks.effect: If the amount of Energy attached to both Active Pokémon is 5 or more, this attack does 60 more damage.

attacks.name: Singe
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Pop-Punk
attacks.effect: Discard 3 {R} Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Binding Snow
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, they can't take any Energy from their Energy Zone to attach to their Active Pokémon.

name: Mega Swampert ex
description:
Its arms are hard as rock. With one swing, it can
break an enormous boulder into pieces.

attacks.name: Strong-Armed Destroyer
attacks.effect: Discard 2 random Energy from among the Energy attached to all Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's).

attacks.name: Damaging Spark
attacks.effect: This attack also does 30 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon that has damage on it.

abilities.name: Disguise
abilities.effect: When this Pokémon is first damaged by an attack after coming into play, prevent that damage.

attacks.name: Megaton Cannon
attacks.effect: This attack does 140 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

name: Mega Mawile ex
description:
Its two sets of jaws thrash about violently as if
they each had a will of their own. One gnash from
them can turn a boulder to dust.

attacks.name: Heat-Up Crunch
attacks.effect: Until this Pokémon leaves the Active Spot, this Pokémon's Heat-Up Crunch attack does +30 damage. This effect stacks.

name: Mega Kangaskhan ex
description:
Mega Kangaskhan's strength derives from the
mother's happiness about her child's growth.
Watching it grow up keeps her spirits high.

attacks.name: Double-Punching Family
attacks.effect:
This attack is used twice in a row. The second attack does 40 damage.
(If the first attack Knocks Out your opponent's Active Pokémon, the second attack is used after your opponent chooses a new Active Pokémon.)

name: Mega Gardevoir ex
description:
When it opens the red plate on its chest and
unleashes its heart, its strongest psychic power
is released.

attacks.name: Fantasia Force
attacks.effect: Take 3 {P} Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to your {P} Pokémon in any way you like.

name: Meowth
description:
It loves things that sparkle. When it sees a shiny
object, the gold coin on its head shines, too.

abilities.name: Carefree Steps
abilities.effect: If any damage is done to this Pokémon by attacks, flip a coin. If heads, prevent that damage.

attacks.name: Feelin' Fine
attacks.effect: Draw a card.

name: Tangela
description:
Hidden beneath a tangle of vines that grows
nonstop even if the vines are torn off, this
Pokémon's true appearance remains a mystery.

attacks.name: Sleep Powder
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

name: Magby
description:
This Pokémon is still small and timid.
Whenever Magby gets excited or surprised,
flames leak from its mouth and its nose.

attacks.name: Toasty Toss
attacks.effect: Take a {R} Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your Benched Basic Pokémon.

name: Magmar
description:
Magmar dispatches its prey with fire. But it
regrets this habit once it realizes that it has
burned its intended prey to a charred crisp.

attacks.name: Stoke
attacks.effect: Take a {R} Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to this Pokémon.

name: Horsea
description:
Horsea makes its home in oceans with gentle
currents. If this Pokémon is under attack, it spits
out pitch-black ink and escapes.

name: Seadra
description:
It's the males that raise the offspring. While
Seadra are raising young, the spines on their
backs secrete thicker and stronger poison.

name: Mantyke
description:
It's highly friendly and easily tamed. Tours that
take people swimming with Mantyke are a
super-popular beach activity.

attacks.name: Splashy Toss
attacks.effect: Take a {W} Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your Benched Basic Pokémon.

name: Omanyte
description:
Because some Omanyte manage to escape after
being restored or are released into the wild by
people, this species is becoming a problem.

name: Omastar
description:
Weighed down by a large and heavy shell,
Omastar couldn't move very fast. Some say it
went extinct because it was unable to catch food.

attacks.name: Ancient Whirlpool
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't attack.

name: Pichu
description:
It is unskilled at storing electric power.
Any kind of shock causes it to discharge
energy spontaneously.

attacks.name: Crackly Toss
attacks.effect: Take a {L} Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your Benched Basic Pokémon.

name: Clefairy
description:
It is said that happiness will come to those who
see a gathering of Clefairy dancing under a
full moon.

name: Clefable
description:
A timid fairy Pokémon that is rarely seen, it will
run and hide the moment it senses people.

name: Latias
description:
It communicates using telepathy. Its body is
covered in down that refracts light to make
it invisible.

attacks.name: Crossing Flights
attacks.effect: If Latios is on your Bench, this attack does 20 more damage.

name: Latios
description:
It understands human speech and is highly
intelligent. It is a tender Pokémon that
dislikes fighting.

abilities.name: Fantastical Floating
abilities.effect: If you have Latias in play, this Pokémon has no Retreat Cost.

attacks.name: Luster Purge
attacks.effect: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon.

name: Hitmonlee
description:
This amazing Pokémon has an awesome sense of
balance. It can kick in succession from any position.

attacks.name: Stretch Kick
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

name: Hitmonchan
description:
Its punches slice the air. They are launched at
such high speed, even a slight graze could cause
a burn.

name: Kabuto
description:
This species is almost entirely extinct. Kabuto
molt every three days, making their shells harder
and harder.

name: Kabutops
description:
Kabutops slices its prey apart and sucks out
the fluids. The discarded body parts become
food for other Pokémon.

attacks.name: Leech Life
attacks.effect: Heal from this Pokémon the same amount of damage you did to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Phanpy
description:
This Pokémon lives and nests on a riverbank.
After playing in the mud, it won't be able to
settle down unless it washes its body.

attacks.name: Reckless Charge
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

name: Tyrogue
description:
It is always bursting with energy. To make itself
stronger, it keeps on fighting even if it loses.

name: Tauros
description:
When Tauros begins whipping itself with its tails,
it's a warning that the Pokémon is about to
charge with astounding speed.

attacks.name: Fighting Tackle
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon ex, this attack does 80 more damage.

abilities.name: Combust
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may attach a {R} Energy from your discard pile to this Pokémon. If you do, do 20 damage to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Fire Spin
attacks.effect: Discard 2 {R} Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Phoenix Turbo
attacks.effect: Take a {R}, {W}, and {L} Energy from your Energy Zone and attach them to your Benched Basic Pokémon in any way you like.

attacks.name: Stormy Prison
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

abilities.name: Psychic Healing
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may heal 30 damage from 1 of your Pokémon.

abilities.name: Happy Ribbon
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, when you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon, you may draw 2 cards.

attacks.name: Gigantic Press
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has at least 2 extra {F} Energy attached, this attack does 60 more damage.

abilities.name: Dark Chase
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may switch in 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon that has damage on it to the Active Spot.

attacks.name: Elemental Blast
attacks.effect: Discard a {R}, {W}, and {L} Energy from this Pokémon.

name: Meloetta
description:
Its melodies are sung with a special vocalization
method that can control the feelings of those who
hear it.

abilities.name: Strange Singing
abilities.effect: At the beginning of your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, put a random {P} Pokémon from your deck into your hand.

name: Protective Poncho
effect: As long as the Pokémon this card is attached to is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to that Pokémon by your opponent's attacks and Abilities.
